category_sources: source_facts.description says Terratag automates tagging for AWS, Azure, and GCP resources in Terraform; official site describes applying tags or labels across Terraform or Terragrunt files.

docs_sources: Official Terratag website provides install and usage steps and links to the official GitHub repository for detailed information.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/env0/terratag, so repo was not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official Terratag website describe tagging AWS, Azure, and GCP resources in Terraform or Terragrunt files.
